chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Good Deeds

text: 1684 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَيُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ أَوْصَلَ إِلَى أَخِيهِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ مَعْرُوفاً فَقَدْ أَوْصَلَ ذَلِكَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1684 - Imam (as) said: “Any believer who extends kindness to his fellow believer has indeed extended that kindness to the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family)."
